entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The crop species being studied for resistance to Fusarium wilt.

entities.name: FUSARIUM WILT
entities.description: A biotic stress causing yield losses in pigeonpea.

entities.name: FUSARIUM WILT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pigeonpea to resist Fusarium wilt, targeted for genetic improvement.

entities.name: GENOMICS-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: An economically feasible breeding approach for developing high yielding and resistant genotypes.

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINES
entities.description: Mapping populations (PRIL_A and PRIL_B) used for the development of genetic maps.

entities.name: F2 POPULATION
entities.description: A mapping population used for the development of high density genetic maps.

entities.name: GENOTYPING-BY-SEQUENCING
entities.description: A sequencing approach used to identify and genotype SNPs in mapping populations.

entities.name: SNPS
entities.description: Single nucleotide polymorphisms used as markers for constructing genetic maps.

entities.name: GENETIC MAPS
entities.description: High-density maps developed using SNPs to locate quantitative trait loci.

entities.name: QTL MAPPING
entities.description: The process of identifying quantitative trait loci associated with a specific trait.

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCI
entities.description: Genomic regions associated with the phenotypic variance of Fusarium wilt resistance.

entities.name: QFW11.1
entities.description: A specific quantitative trait locus identified for Fusarium wilt resistance.

entities.name: QFW11.2
entities.description: A specific quantitative trait locus identified for Fusarium wilt resistance.

entities.name: QFW11.3
entities.description: A specific quantitative trait locus identified for Fusarium wilt resistance.
